heading: Omitted
label: 1701g to 1701g–3 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 1701g to 1701g–3 were from sections 102 to 102c of the Housing Act of 1948, and provided for loans to aid production and distribution of prefabricated housing; provided for loans to assure maintenance of industrial capacity for production of such homes for national defense; provided for the powers of the Housing and Home Finance Administrator; and included mobile or portable houses within the term “prefabricated houses”. Authority for issuance of section 1701g obligations under section 1(4) of Reorg. Plan No. 23 of 1950 as terminating , see . Authority to make or purchase section 1701g–1 loans or obligations as terminating , see , The Public Health and Welfare.June 30, 1954July 31, 1954section 1701g–5 of this titlesection 1591c of Title 42Section 1701g, , , amended , title V, § 501, .act Aug. 10, 1948, ch. 832, title I, § 10262 Stat. 1275Sept. 1, 1951, ch. 37865 Stat. 311Section 1701g–1, , added , title V, § 502, .act Aug. 10, 1948, ch. 832, title I, § 102aSept. 1, 1951, ch. 37865 Stat. 312Section 1701g–2, , added , title V, § 502, ; amended , .act Aug. 10, 1948, ch. 832, title I, § 102bSept. 1, 1951, ch. 37865 Stat. 312July 14, 1952, ch. 723, § 10(e)66 Stat. 604Section 1701g–3, , added , title V, § 502, .act Aug. 10, 1948, ch. 832, title I, § 102cSept. 1, 1951, ch. 37865 Stat. 312
